name: PIXEL Q-switched ND:YAG Laser
shortDescription: 2025 Polish award-winning compact ND:YAG laser. 3 wavelengths, treats red pigment too, 4.3" touchscreen.
description: The PIXEL ND:YAG laser is not just another compact device — it is one of the most intelligent and powerful solutions in the world of pigment and tattoo removal. In 2025, it won an award in Poland in the desktop Q-switched ND:YAG laser device category.
metaTitle: PIXEL Q-switched ND:YAG Laser | Tattoo removal & carbon peeling
metaDescription: PIXEL Q-switched ND:YAG laser: compact, high-performance pigment and tattoo removal device. 3 wavelengths, carbon peeling function. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: The PIXEL doesn't promise – it delivers. With laser precision.
paragraphs: It works with three wavelengths (532 nm, 1064 nm, 1320 nm), so it confidently treats every skin type and every pigment shade – even those you thought were impossible.
You heard that red pigment can't be removed? The PIXEL wipes away even the most stubborn red eyebrow tattoo as if it was never there.
The built-in cooling system and intelligent energy distribution ensure that the skin remains safe and evenly treated. Precision that's invisible, results that are striking.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the PIXEL laser? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see the PIXEL ND:YAG laser in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the PIXEL ND:YAG laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why is the PIXEL your favourite weapon in the treatment room?
featureRows.subtitle: Compact, yet brutally effective – with style

features.title: 3 wavelengths – a solution for every pigment
features.description:
The PIXEL works on three wavelengths, effectively treating every colour of pigment and tattoo.

Wavelengths and their applications:

532 nm – red, orange, warm brown pigments
1064 nm – black, blue, grey, green pigments
1320 nm – carbon peeling, deep cleansing, skin rejuvenation
features.highlight: The 532 nm wavelength effectively treats red and orange pigments – something many other lasers cannot do.

features.title: Red pigment removal – what others can't do
features.description: Removing warm-toned pigments (red, orange, warm brown) is one of the biggest challenges in tattoo removal. Most ND:YAG lasers only work at 1064 nm, which is effective on dark pigments but struggles with light, warm shades. The PIXEL's 532 nm wavelength was specifically designed for these stubborn pigments.
features.highlight: The PIXEL solves even the 'impossible' red eyebrow tattoos.

features.title: Carbon peeling – premium facial treatment
features.description:
The 1320 nm wavelength enables carbon peeling, an extremely popular and profitable facial treatment service. A special carbon layer is applied to the skin, then laser pulses remove impurities and stimulate collagen production.

Results:

Visibly cleaner skin
Pore tightening
Collagen stimulation
Fresh, radiant skin

features.title: Compact and intelligent design
features.description:
Despite its compact size, the PIXEL delivers professional performance. The intelligent water and air cooling system ensures safe treatment, while the 4.3-inch touchscreen and foot pedal control provide maximum treatment comfort.

Treatment parameters:

Pulse energy: 10–2000 mJ
Frequency: 1–10 Hz
Water and air cooling
4.3" touchscreen + foot pedal

features.title: Award-winning in 2025 – international recognition
features.description: In 2025, the PIXEL won the award for best compact desktop Q-switched ND:YAG laser device in Poland. This international recognition proves that the PIXEL is not only compact and elegant, but also at the forefront of its category in terms of performance.
features.highlight: Award-winning quality at an affordable price – that's the PIXEL.

training.headline: Device operator training – official certified course
training.intro: An official, certified training course registered in the FAR system is available for the PIXEL ND:YAG laser. The curriculum was developed under the mentorship of a certified instructor from the healthcare sector and is based on professional materials from a Russian laser specialist physician.
items: Operating principles of Q-switched ND:YAG laser technology
Wavelengths and application areas (tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling)
Treatment protocols for different pigment types
Contraindications, skin type assessment and safe treatment
closingParagraphs: The aim of the training is to enable participants to safely and legally apply the PIXEL laser for cosmetic and aesthetic treatments.
Upon completion of the training, an official FAR certificate will be issued.

testimonials.name: Annamária Kis
testimonials.text: I use the PIXEL for both tattoo removal and carbon peeling. <mark>My clients love the carbon peeling, the results are dramatic from the very first session</mark>. A compact device that still delivers professional performance. The training was very thorough too!

expertQuote.quote: The ND:YAG laser is one of the most versatile tools on the cosmetic market – tattoo removal, pigment treatment and carbon peeling in a single device. The PIXEL's value for money is outstanding in its category.
expertQuote.author: László Horváth

functionCards.name: Red pigment treatment

functionCards.name: Carbon peeling
functionCards.description: Deep cleansing, pore tightening and skin rejuvenation at 1320 nm wavelength

functionCards.description: Correction and removal of eyebrow, lip and eyelid permanent makeup

faq.question: What tattoos can the PIXEL treat?
faq.answer: The PIXEL works on three wavelengths, so it can treat almost every colour of tattoo. The 1064 nm is for dark colours (black, blue, grey, green), the 532 nm for warm colours (red, orange, brown). This includes both body tattoos and permanent makeup (eyebrow, lip).

faq.question: Does it really treat red pigment?
faq.answer: Yes! The 532 nm wavelength is specifically designed for warm-toned pigments (red, orange, warm brown). Many competing ND:YAG lasers only work at 1064 nm, which is effective on dark colours but struggles with light, warm tones. The PIXEL excels in this area.

faq.question: What is carbon peeling and how profitable is it?
faq.answer: Carbon peeling is a premium facial treatment where a special carbon layer is applied to the skin, then removed with laser pulses. The result: visibly cleaner skin, smaller pores, stimulated collagen production. A treatment can be priced between 15,000-30,000 Ft, and clients regularly return (recommended every 4-6 weeks).

faq.question: How quickly does the PIXEL pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-3 months, with 3-5 clients per day. Tattoo removal costs 15,000-50,000 Ft per treatment, carbon peeling 15,000-30,000 Ft. Use our ROI calculator on the page for an exact calculation!

faq.question: What training comes with the PIXEL?
faq.answer: An official, FAR-registered device operator training is included FREE with the device purchase. The curriculum is based on materials from healthcare educators and a Russian laser specialist physician.

faq.question: The PIXEL is compact – is it powerful enough for professional work?
faq.answer: Absolutely! The compact size does not mean compromised performance. The 10-2000 mJ pulse energy and 1-10 Hz frequency enable professional-level treatment. The 2025 Polish award also proves that the PIXEL is one of the best devices in its category.

faq.question: Can I see the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can personally view and try out the PIXEL ND:YAG laser in our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by prior appointment.
